name: Slap Contest
description: Welcome to Slap Contest Game. Move left and right and double tap to slap your opponent. Get 3 slaps to move to the next level. You can choose to play 2P mode if you want play with your frinds and family. Enjoy
instructions: Arrows to move and tap right arrow two times to slap
tags: Best, Fight, Fighting, Hot, Multiplayer, Stickman, Street Fighting
